# services.xsuspender

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.xsuspender`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.xsuspender.debug` | `boolean` | Whether to enable debug output. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults` | `submodule` | XSuspender defaults. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.autoSuspendOnBattery` | `boolean` | Whether to auto-apply rules when switching to battery power even if the window(s) didn't just lose focus. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.downclockOnBattery` | `signed integer` | Limit CPU consumption for this factor when on battery power. Value 1 means 50% decrease, 2 means 66%, 3 means 75% etc. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.execResume` | `null or string` | Before resuming, execute this shell script. Resume the process regardless script failure. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.execSuspend` | `null or string` | Before suspending, execute this shell script. If it fails, abort suspension. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.matchWmClassContains` | `null or string` | Match windows that wm class contains string. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.matchWmClassGroupContains` | `null or string` | Match windows where wm class group contains string. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.matchWmNameContains` | `null or string` | Match windows where wm name contains string. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.onlyOnBattery` | `boolean` | Whether to enable process suspend only on battery. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.resumeEvery` | `signed integer` | Resume interval in seconds. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.resumeFor` | `signed integer` | Resume duration in seconds. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.sendSignals` | `boolean` | Whether to send SIGSTOP / SIGCONT signals or not. If false just the exec scripts are run. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.suspendDelay` | `signed integer` | Initial suspend delay in seconds. |
| `services.xsuspender.defaults.suspendSubtreePattern` | `null or string` | Also suspend descendant processes that match this regex. |
| `services.xsuspender.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable XSuspender. |
| `services.xsuspender.package` | `package` | The xsuspender package to use. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of XSuspender rules. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.autoSuspendOnBattery` | `boolean` | Whether to auto-apply rules when switching to battery power even if the window(s) didn't just lose focus. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.downclockOnBattery` | `signed integer` | Limit CPU consumption for this factor when on battery power. Value 1 means 50% decrease, 2 means 66%, 3 means 75% etc. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.execResume` | `null or string` | Before resuming, execute this shell script. Resume the process regardless script failure. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.execSuspend` | `null or string` | Before suspending, execute this shell script. If it fails, abort suspension. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.matchWmClassContains` | `null or string` | Match windows that wm class contains string. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.matchWmClassGroupContains` | `null or string` | Match windows where wm class group contains string. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.matchWmNameContains` | `null or string` | Match windows where wm name contains string. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.onlyOnBattery` | `boolean` | Whether to enable process suspend only on battery. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.resumeEvery` | `signed integer` | Resume interval in seconds. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.resumeFor` | `signed integer` | Resume duration in seconds. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.sendSignals` | `boolean` | Whether to send SIGSTOP / SIGCONT signals or not. If false just the exec scripts are run. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.suspendDelay` | `signed integer` | Initial suspend delay in seconds. |
| `services.xsuspender.rules.<name>.suspendSubtreePattern` | `null or string` | Also suspend descendant processes that match this regex. |
